didactic.example_ko: 그 소설은 너무 교훈적이라 즐기기 어려웠다.

disingenuous.example_en: It would be disingenuous to claim we did not know.
disingenuous.example_ko: 우리가 몰랐다고 주장하는 것은 위선적일 것이다.

egregious.example_en: This was an egregious violation of human rights.

enervate.example_en: The tropical heat enervated the travelers.

ephemeral.example_en: Fame can be ephemeral in the age of social media.
ephemeral.example_ko: 소셜 미디어 시대에 명성은 덧없을 수 있다.

equivocal.example_en: The results of the study were equivocal.

erudite.example_en: She is an erudite scholar of medieval history.

exonerate.example_en: DNA evidence exonerated the wrongly convicted man.
exonerate.example_ko: DNA 증거가 억울하게 유죄 판결을 받은 남성의 무죄를 입증했다.

facetious.example_en: I was being facetious. I did not actually mean it.

garrulous.example_en: The garrulous old man talked for hours.

harbinger.example_en: The robin is often seen as a harbinger of spring.

iconoclast.example_en: She was an iconoclast who challenged every tradition.
iconoclast.example_ko: 그녀는 모든 전통에 도전한 인습 타파주의자였다.

impervious.example_ko: 그는 비판에 영향을 받지 않는 것처럼 보였다.

inexorable.example_en: The inexorable march of technology continues.
inexorable.example_ko: 기술의 막을 수 없는 진보가 계속된다.

insidious.example_en: Misinformation is an insidious threat to democracy.
insidious.example_ko: 잘못된 정보는 민주주의에 대한 교활한 위협이다.

magnanimous.example_en: In victory, she was magnanimous toward her opponents.

mercurial.example_en: His mercurial temperament made him unpredictable.
mercurial.example_ko: 그의 변덕스러운 기질은 그를 예측 불가능하게 만들었다.

nefarious.example_en: The villain's nefarious plot was finally exposed.

obfuscate.example_en: Politicians sometimes obfuscate the truth with complex language.
obfuscate.example_ko: 정치인들은 때때로 복잡한 언어로 진실을 모호하게 한다.

onerous.example_en: The regulations placed onerous requirements on small businesses.
onerous.example_ko: 규제가 중소기업에 부담이 큰 요건을 부과했다.

panacea.example_en: Technology is not a panacea for all social problems.
panacea.example_ko: 기술이 모든 사회 문제의 만병통치약은 아니다.

pernicious.example_en: The pernicious effects of racism persist in society.

pertinent.example_en: Please limit your comments to pertinent topics.
pertinent.example_ko: 관련된 주제에 대해서만 의견을 말씀해 주세요.

polemical.example_en: His polemical essay provoked heated debate.
polemical.example_ko: 그의 논쟁적인 에세이는 뜨거운 토론을 불러일으켰다.

preemptive.example_en: The military launched a preemptive strike.

quagmire.example_en: The country found itself in a political quagmire.

recalcitrant.example_en: The recalcitrant student refused to follow any rules.
recalcitrant.example_ko: 반항적인 학생은 어떤 규칙도 따르기를 거부했다.

repudiate.example_en: The government repudiated the allegations of corruption.

spurious.example_en: The court rejected the spurious claims.

surreptitious.example_en: She took a surreptitious glance at his phone.
surreptitious.example_ko: 그녀는 그의 전화기를 몰래 흘끗 보았다.

tautology.example_en: Saying free gift is a tautology.
tautology.example_ko: 무료 선물이라고 말하는 것은 동어 반복이다.

tenable.example_ko: 그의 입장은 점점 더 방어할 수 없게 되었다.

truculent.example_en: His truculent attitude made negotiation impossible.
truculent.example_ko: 그의 호전적인 태도가 협상을 불가능하게 만들었다.

vacillate.example_en: She vacillated between accepting and rejecting the offer.

verisimilitude.example_en: The film achieved remarkable verisimilitude in its depiction of war.
verisimilitude.example_ko: 그 영화는 전쟁 묘사에서 놀라운 사실성을 달성했다.

vicissitude.example_en: The company survived the vicissitudes of the market.

vitriolic.example_en: The debate descended into vitriolic personal attacks.

zealous.example_en: She is a zealous defender of civil liberties.

acrimonious.example_en: The divorce was long and acrimonious.

ameliorate.example_en: The program aims to ameliorate living conditions for refugees.
ameliorate.example_ko: 이 프로그램은 난민들의 생활 조건을 개선하는 것을 목표로 한다.

capricious.example_en: The capricious weather made planning outdoor events difficult.
capricious.example_ko: 변덕스러운 날씨가 야외 행사 계획을 어렵게 만들었다.

chicanery.example_en: The election was marred by political chicanery.

loquacious.example_en: The loquacious host kept guests entertained all evening.
loquacious.example_ko: 말이 많은 호스트가 저녁 내내 손님들을 즐겁게 했다.

perfunctory.example_en: He gave a perfunctory nod and continued working.
perfunctory.example_ko: 그는 형식적으로 고개를 끄덕이고 계속 일했다.

promulgate.example_en: The new regulations were promulgated last week.

sycophant.example_en: He surrounded himself with sycophants who never disagreed.
sycophant.example_ko: 그는 결코 반대하지 않는 아첨꾼들로 자신을 둘러쌌다.

tendentious.example_en: The report was criticized for being tendentious.

adjacent.example_en: The hotel is adjacent to the train station.

aggregate.example_en: The aggregate cost exceeded our budget.

assert.example_en: She asserted her right to speak at the meeting.

chronic.example_en: Chronic stress can lead to serious health problems.
chronic.example_ko: 만성 스트레스는 심각한 건강 문제를 초래할 수 있다.

conform.example_en: Students were expected to conform to strict rules.
conform.example_ko: 학생들은 엄격한 규칙을 따를 것으로 기대되었다.

deteriorate.example_en: Air quality continues to deteriorate in major cities.

diminish.example_ko: 아무것도 그의 업적을 줄일 수 없다.

displace.example_en: Millions of people were displaced by the conflict.

preclude.example_en: Bad weather precluded any outdoor activities.
preclude.example_ko: 악천후가 모든 야외 활동을 불가능하게 했다.

erode.example_en: Public trust in institutions has been eroded.

fragment.example_en: Only fragments of the original manuscript survive.

marginalize.example_en: Minority groups are often marginalized in society.

skeptical.example_en: Scientists remain skeptical about the findings.
skeptical.example_ko: 과학자들은 그 발견에 대해 여전히 회의적이다.

abdicate.example_en: The king abdicated the throne in favor of his son.

assimilate.example_en: Immigrants often struggle to assimilate into a new culture.
assimilate.example_ko: 이민자들은 종종 새로운 문화에 동화되기 위해 고군분투한다.

attrition.example_en: The company reduced staff through natural attrition.
attrition.example_ko: 회사는 자연 감원을 통해 직원을 줄였다.

clandestine.example_en: The government ran clandestine operations abroad.

circumvent.example_en: They found ways to circumvent the regulations.

delineate.example_en: The report delineates the responsibilities of each department.

deplore.example_en: Human rights groups deplore the use of torture.

deprecate.example_en: The old method has been deprecated in favor of a new approach.
deprecate.example_ko: 이전 방법은 새로운 접근 방식을 위해 폐기되었다.

emancipate.example_en: The movement sought to emancipate enslaved people.
emancipate.example_ko: 그 운동은 노예화된 사람들을 해방하고자 했다.

extrapolate.example_en: We can extrapolate future trends from current data.
extrapolate.example_ko: 현재 데이터에서 미래 추세를 추정할 수 있다.

galvanize.example_en: The crisis galvanized the community into action.

homogeneous.example_en: The population is not culturally homogeneous.

indiscriminate.example_en: The attack was indiscriminate, killing civilians and soldiers alike.
indiscriminate.example_ko: 공격은 무차별적이었고, 민간인과 군인을 가리지 않고 사살했다.

jurisprudence.example_en: She is an expert in constitutional jurisprudence.

meticulous.example_en: She is meticulous about keeping accurate records.
meticulous.example_ko: 그녀는 정확한 기록을 유지하는 데 꼼꼼하다.

ostensible.example_en: The ostensible reason for the meeting was budget planning.

rescind.example_en: The company rescinded the job offer.

vindicate.example_en: The court ruling vindicated her decision.

efficacy.example_en: The efficacy of the vaccine was proven in clinical trials.

propensity.example_en: He has a propensity for taking unnecessary risks.
propensity.example_ko: 그는 불필요한 위험을 감수하는 성향이 있다.
